item.text: I’ll skip trashing, move straight to buy/end on the deck side, then use the board turn to kill the 1 HP scout, damage the forward raider, and recruit another raider.

item.command:
/bin/zsh -lc 'set -euo pipefail
RUN=.games/e024-codex-rush-vs-engine-guided
cat > "$RUN/actions/turn-019.deck.json" <<'"'JSON'
{\"schemaVersion\":1,\"turnId\":\"turn-019\",\"player\":\"P1\",\"actions\":[{\"type\":\"moveToBuy\"},{\"type\":\"endTurn\"}]}
JSON
bun run --silent cli -- deck-turn --config rulesets/territory-v1-cost6-damagecap-responsewin-lead4-highmove-center6/deck.yaml --state \""'$RUN/deck.json" --actions "$RUN/actions/turn-019.deck.json" --result "$RUN/results/turn-019.deck.result.json"
cat > "$RUN/actions/turn-019.board.json" <<'"'JSON'
{\"schemaVersion\":1,\"turnId\":\"turn-019\",\"player\":\"P1\",\"actions\":{\"movements\":[{\"unit\":\"P1-raider-turn-013-1\",\"from\":{\"col\":7,\"row\":5},\"to\":{\"col\":7,\"row\":6}},{\"unit\":\"P1-raider-turn-015-1\",\"from\":{\"col\":8,\"row\":3},\"to\":{\"col\":6,\"row\":5}},{\"unit\":\"P1-raider-turn-017-1\",\"from\":{\"col\":10,\"row\":1},\"to\":{\"col\":8,\"row\":3}}],\"recruits\":[{\"unit\":\"P1-raider-turn-019-1\",\"type\":\"raider\",\"at\":{\"col\":10,\"row\":1}}],\"attacks\":[{\"attacker\":\"P1-raider-turn-013-1\",\"target\":\"P2-scout-start-2\",\"deckDamage\":0},{\"attacker\":\"P1-raider-turn-015-1\",\"target\":\"P2-raider-turn-014-1\",\"deckDamage\":0}],\"heals\":[],\"upgrades\":[]}}
JSON
bun run --silent cli -- board-turn --state \""'$RUN/board.json" --deck-result "$RUN/results/turn-019.deck.result.json" --actions "$RUN/actions/turn-019.board.json" --result "$RUN/results/turn-019.board.result.json"
bun run --silent playtest -- commit-turn --run "$RUN" --deck-result "$RUN/results/turn-019.deck.result.json" --board-result "$RUN/results/turn-019.board.result.json" --summary "P1 skipped trashing, removed P2'"'s wounded scout, damaged the forward raider, reinforced the center, and recruited another raider.\" --reasoning \"RUSH plan: avoid tempo-negative trashing, convert board actions into immediate kills and damage, keep fresh raiders flowing toward contested centers, and spend supply on another attacker.\" --strict-win
bun run --silent validate-run -- --strict --strict-deck --strict-win \""'$RUN/timeline.json"
printf '"'\\nDECK_FILE\\n'
jq -c '.' \""'$RUN/results/turn-019.deck.result.json"
printf '"'BOARD_FILE\\n'
jq -c '.' \""'$RUN/results/turn-019.board.result.json"'

cat > "$RUN/actions/turn-019.board.json" <<'"'JSON'
{\"schemaVersion\":1,\"turnId\":\"turn-019\",\"player\":\"P1\",\"actions\":{\"movements\":[{\"unit\":\"P1-raider-turn-013-1\",\"from\":{\"col\":7,\"row\":5},\"to\":{\"col\":7,\"row\":6}},{\"unit\":\"P1-raider-turn-015-1\",\"from\":{\"col\":8,\"row\":3},\"to\":{\"col\":6,\"row\":5}},{\"unit\":\"P1-raider-turn-017-1\",\"from\":{\"col\":10,\"row\":1},\"to\":{\"col\":8,\"row\":3}}],\"recruits\":[{\"unit\":\"P1-raider-turn-019-1\",\"type\":\"raider\",\"at\":{\"col\":10,\"row\":1}}],\"attacks\":[{\"attacker\":\"P1-raider-turn-013-1\",\"target\":\"P2-scout-start-2\",\"deckDamage\":0},{\"attacker\":\"P1-raider-turn-015-1\",\"target\":\"P2-raider-turn-014-1\",\"deckDamage\":0}],\"heals\":[],\"upgrades\":[]}}
JSON
bun run --silent cli -- board-turn --state \""'$RUN/board.json" --deck-result "$RUN/results/turn-019.deck.result.json" --actions "$RUN/actions/turn-019.board.json" --result "$RUN/results/turn-019.board.result.json"

printf '"'\\nDECK_FILE\\n'
jq -c '.' \""'$RUN/results/turn-019.deck.result.json"
printf '"'BOARD_FILE\\n'
jq -c '.' \""'$RUN/results/turn-019.board.result.json"'

item.text:
Committed and validated `turn-019`.

Deck line: moved to buy, ended turn. Bought nothing. Produced `6` money.

Board line: moved raiders to `(7,6)`, `(6,5)`, and `(8,3)`, recruited `P1-raider-turn-019-1` at `(10,1)`, removed `P2-scout-start-2`, and dealt `6` damage to `P2-raider-turn-014-1`.

Rationale: no action card meant trashing would cost tempo, so P1 converted the turn into immediate board pressure: finish a wounded unit, weaken another raider, reinforce the center, and recruit another attacker. Strict validation passed.
